notes:
Simplified to 6 categories: strategy, coding, vision, support, general, chat. strategy merges planning + advanced_coding; support merges daily_support + emergency_fallback; quick_response keywords were fully preserved by merging into support/general/chat.
[scheme B] move ambiguous short tokens (pip/CI/pipeline) out of contains sets; reintroduce via regex word-boundary/context patterns.
[sync] merged coding keyword draft (coding关键词库.txt part1/2/3/4) keywordSets into keyword-library.json (sets only; not auto-wired).
[cleanup] remove ambiguous tokens CI/pipeline from coding.feature.build_and_toolchain (handled by regex/safer phrases).
[wiring] add coding.feature.package_files and coding.feature.build_and_toolchain to kinds.coding positive (weight=2).
[fix] normalize regex pattern escape level (\\ -> \) so RegExp() receives real regex escapes.
[tune] set coding.minStrongHits=0 to improve recall for file/tooling signals.
[tune] restore coding.minStrongHits=1 (use *.strong set ids to satisfy strongHit without raising weight).
[tune] mark package_files/build_and_toolchain as strong by using *.strong set ids (counts as strongHit).
[conservative] add small safe strong coding set for framework/tooling-specific terms (weight=2).
[strategy scheme B] move race/architecture to regex word-boundary to avoid substring matches (trace/conceptual steals).
[conservative] add context.Context/trace id (Go tracing) to safe coding strong set.
[sql] wire coding.lang.sql.strong (weight=2) so natural-language prompts that mention 'SQL' (without SELECT/FROM) still hit coding under minStrongHits=1.
[cleanup] dedup coding.lang.sql.strong terms to avoid double scoring (SQL vs SQL：).
[sql] simplify coding.lang.sql.strong: keep only core tokens to avoid duplicate matches (SQL:, SQL：).

[regex-bounds] add contextful word-boundary regex for language mentions, rails/bun commands, verilog reg, and filename extensions.
[fix] correct regex escape level for contextful word-boundary patterns.
[fix] remove overly broad filename/file-ext regex (docs.rs false positive).
[fix] split Python/Rust regex into CN/EN variants (JS \b does not work after CJK tokens).
[route-fix] TypeScript, debounce, remove:support.weak:支持
[fix] promote TypeScript/debounce to coding.strong (contains) and drop their regex; keep support.weak without ambiguous token 支持.
[wiring] wire ALL coding.* keywordSets into kinds.coding positive (weight=3).
[wiring] exclude coding.abbrev.risky_reference_only from positive wiring (reference-only).
[tighten] keep ALL coding.* sets wired, but down-weight non-strong sets to 1; keep *.strong and coding.strong at 3. Exclude coding.abbrev.risky_reference_only from positive.
[tune] add optimization-related strong phrases (code/perf/sql/query/index) to coding.strong; keep bare 优化 in coding.weak only.
[tune] add optimization/improvement suggestion phrases to support.strong and wire into support positive.
